ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND ( OR(ISCHANGED( Site__c ) , ISCHANGED( Type__c ) , ISCHANGED( Unit__c ) , ISCHANGED( Auto_Create_Daily_Report_Items__c ), ISCHANGED( Contract__c ), ISCHANGED( Report_Date__c )), OR(TEXT( Status__c ) = 'Submitted',TEXT( Status__c ) = 'Invoiced') ) , TRUE, FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot Edit a Daily Report for a Status Submitted Or Invoiced
